name: figma-mcp
description: Bridge to Figma Desktop's local MCP server over SSE — exposes Figma design file tools and resources via renre-kit query.
author: renre-kit

actions.name: call-tool
actions.description: Invoke a Figma MCP tool by name

actions.name: read-resource
actions.description: Read a specific Figma MCP resource by URI

schema.label: Figma MCP Port
schema.description: Port number of the local Figma Desktop MCP server.

skills.name: figma-query
skills.description: Teaches LLMs how to query Figma design files, components, styles, and variables via renre-kit query.
